description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features clean lines, large glass windows, and a mix of white and neutral tones, complemented by landscaped areas with palm trees and shrubs. The house includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as patios and a pool area, seamlessly integrated with the interior through sliding glass doors. The driveway accommodates several vehicles, and the main entrance is accentuated by a minimalist pathway and subtle landscaping. The roof is flat and likely supports HVAC units or solar panels, typical of contemporary architecture. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, natural light, and a connection to the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor spaces, including patios and a pool. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and an open, airy layout.
description_view_0: This view highlights the driveway, main entrance, and a landscaped area with palm trees along the side, as well as the open patio and pool area at the rear.
description_view_1: From this side, the flat roof and extensive use of glass are prominent, with visible outdoor seating areas and a clear view of the pool and patio.
description_view_2: This angle showcases the rear of the house, including the large patio, pool, and additional landscaping, with the open layout connecting indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the row of palm trees, the flat roofline, and the integration of outdoor living spaces with the house's modern facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and landscaped pathway, no prominent porch or columns
